_note: Built-in item mapping functions. Reference by name in rule files.

join.description: Item identity is the cross-product of all dimension values. item_id is row-major index over dimensions in the order listed in the rule file. Semantic name: dim0_dim1_..._object. Nonce name: nonce_dim0_nonce_dim1_...

index.description: Single-dimension mapping. item_id equals the dimension value index directly. Semantic name: dim_value_object. Nonce name: nonce_dim_value.
